## Description

**SPECIFICALLY DESIGNED TO CLEAN THE RIMS OF ANY CAR BRAND.**

Does not damage surfaces and restores a clean, glossy finish. Leaves a protective antioxidant film, it is also effective on dirt deposits on brake linings, brake pads and stubborn dirt.

| 
**Dilution**

| 
Ready for use
